prompt: Search the web for "Node.js WebSocket library comparison" and give me a summary of the top options.
system: You are a coding assistant with access to the tools listed below. Use them to accomplish the user's request.

tools.name: brave_web_search
tools.description: Search the web using Brave Search API. Returns search results with titles, URLs, and snippets.

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch the contents of a web page at a given URL.

tools.name: read_text_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a text file.

rubric: 1=no tool call or used read_text_file, 2=used web_fetch with a guessed URL instead of searching first, 3=used brave_web_search but with a poorly formed query, 4=used brave_web_search with a reasonable query, 5=uses brave_web_search with query closely matching "Node.js WebSocket library comparison" and provides a summary based on results
